text:
I grew up in a world where the wind whispered secrets like old friends. I spent my days gazing skyward, watching the dance of clouds, listening to legends that the wind spoke.

There was EOLIA – a giantess who fell from the sky, leaving a whispering grove at the edge of evergreens. Then there was HAWKEFUL HAAMAUSONUS, an old owl that roamed silently through the night, guiding wanderers home.

One evening, rain laced with starlight fell gently upon my head, and I heard a voice that sang in the shadows. "Your heart beats like a drum amidst the whispers."

I followed the song, tracing its hum through the thickets towards a crack in the ground. From there, it climbed a tall, twisted branch. I watched as the moon rose, larger than usual, casting an orange glow.

At the foot of the tree stood a woman encased in twilight. Her hair was like molten gold,
